description: clickiung slider on max agents just causes the menu to collapse. You should be able to set the per project settings of Max concurrent agents but the one that's shown here is kind of like a plus one to all projects so it adds plus one agents that are allowed so if the project allows four and the global allows one then the total that project can have is 5
title: Fix slider interaction on max agents setting

descriptionHistory.description: clickiung slider on max agents just causes the menu to collapse. You should be able to set the per project settings of Max concurrent agents but the one that's shown here is kind of like a plus one to all projects so it adds plus one agents that are allowed so if the project allows four and the global allows one then the total that project can have is 5
